skill.foodhealing.taika.desc:
§e【Fireproof Mastery】§r
Grants permanent Fire Resistance, completely negating damage from fire and lava.
skill.foodhealing.suigetsu_anshi.desc:
§e【Abyssal Vision & Breathing】§r
Grants permanent Water Breathing and Night Vision, removing exploration stress.
skill.foodhealing.hayagui.desc:
§e【Fast Eating I】§r
Reduces the time required to eat any food item by half.
skill.foodhealing.honoo.desc:
§e【Blazing Protection】§r
While you are on fire, all incoming damage from any source is reduced by 30%. Since Fireproof Mastery negates fire damage, you can keep yourself on fire to maintain this defensive buff permanently.
skill.foodhealing.bakuha.desc:
§e【Blast Shielding】§r
Reduces all explosion damage (Creepers, TNT, etc.) by 90%.
skill.foodhealing.joka.desc:
§e【Purification Technique】§r
Automatically detects and instantly cures negative status effects (Poison, Weakness, etc.) every tick.
skill.foodhealing.hojo.desc:
§e【Bountiful Crafting】§r
When crafting food items, the output stack amount is automatically doubled.
skill.foodhealing.tosatsu.desc:
§e【Butcher's Expertise】§r
Increases drops from friendly mobs (cows, pigs, etc.) by 3x. Stackable with the Looting enchantment.
skill.foodhealing.kajiba.desc:
§e【Heroics Unleashed】§r
When your health falls below a certain threshold, all outgoing damage is multiplied. Stackable with Shokugi's base attack multiplier for astronomical damage.
skill.foodhealing.manzoku.desc:
§e【Satisfaction / TaCZ Integration】§r
Grants a chance to fire TaCZ weapons without consuming ammo. Starts at 10% at Lv11 and scales up to 100% (infinite ammo). Also prevents miniguns from overheating at Lv11+.
skill.foodhealing.saishu.desc:
§e【Gatherer's Fortune】§r
Greatly increases drop rates for items affected by the Fortune enchantment (ores, crops, and also glowstone/clay). Applied after Fortune calculations, leading to massive item yields.
skill.foodhealing.fukai.desc:
§e【Indestructible Will】§r
Stacks with the vanilla Unbreaking enchantment to preserve armor. From Lv17, completely negates armor destruction debuffs from other mods (e.g., L2 Hostility's Durability Destroyer).
skill.foodhealing.gokui.desc:
§e【Armor Essence】§r
Caps armor durability loss at a maximum of 1 per hit, regardless of damage size. Works alongside Indestructible Will.
skill.foodhealing.hisho.desc:
§e【Flight Mastery】§r
Grants permanent creative flight capabilities in survival mode.
skill.foodhealing.kongo.desc:
§e【Adamant Guard】§r
Grants permanent Resistance IV, drastically reducing incoming damage before basic defense calculations.
skill.foodhealing.tsuigeki.desc:
§e【Ultimate Pursuit】§r
An ultimate end-game skill starting at Lv991. Attacks deal additional follow-up damage, bypassing entity invincibility frames. Deals 1 extra hit per level above 990, capping at 9 simultaneous extra hits at Lv999.
message.foodhealing.diversity_bonus: You feel a surge of vitality! Your maximum health has increased!
message.foodhealing.shokugi_levelup_skil: §6Your Shokugi Level has increased to %d! You learned the skill '%s'!!
